name: public_transportation_workplace_injury_redwood_rig_utl
premise: A Public Transportation response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving public transportation workplace injury redwood rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Jonah Mensah
agents.identity: I am Jonah Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in Public Transportation when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Harper Okoye
agents.identity: I am Harper Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Transportation.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Jonah Mensah must decide under rights vs utility. What does Jonah Mensah do?
